description:
Parent epic: V3 E3: Context and typed results

Source task 1/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify naked context maps work without a schema.

Epic closure criteria:
- new users can pass a naked map first and add schema later
- typed results are stable enough for app code
- context/result docs avoid conflating state, memory, and output

comments.text: Added provider-free coverage that schema-less agents accept naked context maps. The test verifies prepare_chat_opts/2 preserves the map and Jidoka.chat/3 passes it through to an input control without requiring a context schema.

title: E3: Verify naked context maps work without a schema
